input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this .NET project. They haven't run coverage yet, so I need to:

1. First explore the project structure to understand what we're working with
2. Set up and run code coverage
3. Analyze the results

Let me start by exploring the project structure.

data.content: Good — the project already has `coverlet.collector` configured. Let me run the tests with coverage collection.
data.reasoningText: Now I have a clear picture of the project. Let me run code coverage using `dotnet test` with coverlet (already referenced in the test project). I'll generate a Cobertura XML report and then parse it.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-ece092c349be4cb5a2bea5e6da547e05 && dotnet test --collect:\"XPlat Code Coverage\" --results-directory ./coverage-results -- DataCollectionRunSettings.DataCollectors.DataCollector.Configuration.Format=cobertura 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with code coverage", "initial_wait": 60}
